title: Evolution of a Graphical Abstract: From Sketch to Final Implementation

L2: Three-stage evolution from sketch (A) to rapid BioRender draft (B) to final implementation in graphical software (C)
Demonstrates iterative design process for graphical abstracts
L3: Figure 1 from the Ten Simple Rules paper showing the evolution of a graphical abstract through three stages: initial sketch (A), rapid draft in BioRender (B), and final polished implementation in a graphical software program (C). Demonstrates the iterative refinement process. CC BY 4.0.
